rationale: Replace attempt_01's outer `if (LHS) { ... }` wrap — whose inner asserts never propagated to the function-end obligation — with flat per-conjunct asserts on r1 and r2 so the ensures facts are visible at the point where Verus checks the `LHS ==> det_eq` implication. Add a `lemma_timeout_receive_unique` helper for the unit-variant LIoOp::TimeoutReceive, and case-split on the discriminator to surface the alignments the spec actually pins (matching my_end_point, matching ok-bits, matching dst@, matching NetEvent values+views in the Timeout/Timeout sub-case).
